claims: The repository contains a same-radius constructor for conjunction from two already supplied unguarded FO locality input surfaces.
The constructor proves only that if φ and ψ both have input surfaces at radius r, then Formula.conj φ ψ has an input surface at the same radius r.
The constructor is a one-step Boolean lemma, not arbitrary Boolean recursion.
nonclaims: Does not prove shared-radius Boolean family recursion.
Does not prove max-radius Boolean recursion.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
required_lean_markers: unguarded_fo_locality_input_surface_invariant M φ r hφ ρ τ hclose
unguarded_fo_locality_input_surface_invariant M ψ r hψ ρ τ hclose
